title: Business Trip Arrangements
transcript:
Man: Good morning. I need to arrange a business trip to Chicago next month. Can you help me with that?
Woman: Of course. What dates are you planning to travel?
Man: I'd like to leave on the evening of March 12th and return on March 15th.
Woman: Let me check the flight availability. There's a direct flight at 6:30 PM on the 12th. Would you like me to book that?
Man: Yes, please. Also, could you reserve a hotel near the convention center?
Woman: Certainly. I'll book the usual hotel we use. Shall I arrange a rental car as well?
Man: No, that won't be necessary. The client is providing transportation.

questions.stem: What is the man planning to do?
options: Go on a business trip to Chicago
questions.explanation: The man states he needs to arrange a business trip to Chicago.

questions.stem: When will the man return from his trip?
questions.explanation: The man says he'd like to return on March 15th.

questions.stem: Why doesn't the man need a rental car?
options: The hotel offers a shuttle service
questions.explanation: The man says the client is providing transportation, so a rental car is unnecessary.
